targets.queryText: SELECT twr_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT twr_1m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT 'Income' AS component, attribution_income_1m_usd AS amount_usd, attribution_income_1m_pct AS contribution_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Price', attribution_price_1m_usd, attribution_price_1m_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT 'Income' AS component, attribution_income_1m_usd AS amount_usd, attribution_income_1m_pct AS contribution_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'Price', attribution_price_1m_usd, attribution_price_1m_pct FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, twr_12m_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;

targets.queryText: SELECT (as_of_date_local || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, benchmark_twr_1y_pct AS value FROM daily_portfolio WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-365 day') ORDER BY as_of_date_local;
